forecasts.nextMove: Will 'do what is necessary' — door open for more hikes

rba.note: 3rd hike of 2026 = 4.35% (was 4.10%). Middle East oil crisis fuelling inflation. Westpac sees 4.85% by August.

employment.note: Stable at 4.3%. April releases 21/05. Labour market resilient despite hikes.

inflation.note: Headline jumped from 3.7% to 4.6%. Housing +6.5%, Transport +8.9%, Fuel +24.2%. RBA forecast above target until mid-2028.

wages.note: Wages 3.4% vs inflation 4.6% = real wages going BACKWARDS.

migration.note: Demand pressure continues. WA/QLD/SA lead growth.

approvals.vsTarget: 938k forecast vs 1.2M Housing Accord target = 22% shortfall
approvals.note: March approvals DOWN 10.5%. 22% deficit over 5 years. Persistent undersupply POSITIVE for prices.

vacancy.note: Up to 1.2% from 1.0% but still tight. Perth/Adelaide/Brisbane critically low.

medians.note: Two-speed: 24pt gap Perth (+26%) vs Melbourne (+2%). Q1: Perth +7.3%.

clearanceRates.note: Sydney/Melbourne 58-60% below long-term avg. Adelaide 75% strongest.

lending.apraChanges: DTI cap 6x income (20% of new lending max), active since Feb 2026. 3% buffer retained.
lending.note: Investor rates 5.84-6.85% after May hike. DTI cap binding on 10% of investors.

negativeGearing.change: REMOVED for established residential properties acquired after 7:30pm AEST 12 May 2026
exemptions: Properties owned before 12 May 2026 (grandfathered for life)
negativeGearing.impact: Net rental losses on new established purchases QUARANTINED — can only offset rental income or capital gain from same/other rentals. Cannot reduce salary tax. New builds still get full deduction.

capitalGainsTax.change: 50% CGT discount REMOVED, replaced with cost base indexation + 30% minimum tax on net gains
exemptions: Gains accrued BEFORE 1 July 2027 keep 50% discount (auto via valuation at that date)
New residential property buyers can CHOOSE old or new regime
capitalGainsTax.impact: Existing property owners protected via deemed market valuation 1/7/2027. New purchases face min 30% tax on indexed gains from 2027.

firstHomeGuarantee.change: UNLIMITED places + NO income cap from 1 October 2025
firstHomeGuarantee.details: 5% deposit, no LMI. Price caps: Sydney $1.5M, Brisbane $1M, Melbourne $950k, Perth $850k, Adelaide $850k, Hobart $750k, Darwin $750k, Canberra $1M.
firstHomeGuarantee.impact: MASSIVE owner-occupier demand floor. FHBs now compete on equal footing with investors. Demand absorbed even as investor demand drops.

helpToBuy.change: Shared equity scheme — govt takes 30% (existing) or 40% (new build) equity
helpToBuy.details: Reduces deposit needed, govt shares gains/losses. Drives FHB demand up further.
helpToBuy.impact: Another owner-occupier demand boost. Concentrated in lower-priced suburbs.

stampDuty.note: Rates unchanged 2026-27 budget but property prices up = higher dollar cost

defenceCatalysts.summary: AUKUS + F-35 + Army Brigades create 20,000+ direct jobs over 30 years. Defence-anchored suburbs see structural owner-occupier demand independent of investor tax rules — making them best plays under new NG/CGT regime.

aukusSubmarine.totalProgram: $368 billion over 30 years (largest defence project in AU history)

locations.jobs: 5,500 building SSN-AUKUS subs + 4,000 building the infrastructure
locations.timeline: Construction commenced 2026. Skills & Training Academy opening 2026. First SSN-AUKUS by end of decade.

locations.jobs: $8B infrastructure spend + 3,000 direct jobs. Plus 3,000 at Henderson maintenance.
locations.timeline: Submarine Rotational Force-West starts 2027. Virginia Class subs from early 2030s.

fighterJetsAndArmy.role: F-35 main operating base + maintenance hub for ALL 72 AU F-35s
fighterJetsAndArmy.jobs: 4,500+ existing + 400 new F-35 sustainment jobs through 30+ year contract. BAE Systems expanding into 4.4ha at Astra Aerolab.

fighterJetsAndArmy.role: Army 3rd Brigade + largest RAAF base in north QLD
Army 1st Brigade + 1st Aviation Regiment. Major base improvements through 2026.
fighterJetsAndArmy.jobs: ~6,000 personnel + civilian + AUKUS sub rotation forces

fighterJetsAndArmy.role: P-8 Poseidon, E-7 Wedgetail, AP-3C maritime patrol. Adjacent to AUKUS catchment.

infrastructure.summary: Mega-projects beyond defence shifting where growth happens. Olympics, airports, rail, REZs, hydrogen all anchor multi-decade demand.

projects.name: Western Sydney Airport (Nancy-Bird Walton)
projects.jobs: 28,000 direct + indirect by 2031, 200,000+ in Aerotropolis over 20 years
projects.impact: Bradfield City (Australia's 3rd CBD), M12 motorway opened March 2026, rail line opens with airport
projects.warning: Most direct-benefit suburbs already moved. $800k budget excludes Bringelly. Check next-ring.

projects.name: Brisbane 2032 Olympics
projects.investment: $7.1B Cross River Rail (opens 2026) + new stadiums + athletes village
projects.athletesVillage: Bowen Hills (moved from Hamilton). 2,000 units, 6 towers, ~10,000 athletes during games, then build-to-rent.
projects.impact: Construction ramps from late 2026 to mid-2031
projects.secondaryBenefit: Logan + Ipswich get infrastructure spillover and indoor sports centre

projects.name: CopperString HVDC Line
projects.investment: $5B QLD government + $13B leveraged + $7B additional private investment already locked in
projects.impact: Connects Townsville to Mount Isa NWMP — unlocks $680B critical minerals province. Townsville becomes critical minerals + renewable + manufacturing hub.
catchmentSuburbs: Townsville suburbs (Kirwan, Condon, Aitkenvale, Kelso, Mount Louisa) ALL benefit

projects.name: Hunter-Central Coast REZ
projects.impact: 1.8GW new renewable generation. Combined with F-35 sustainment hub = Newcastle area double catalyst.

projects.name: Cross River Rail
projects.impact: Brisbane CBD connection. Direct benefit for Boggo Road, Woolloongabba, plus outer Logan/Ipswich/Caboolture via faster CBD access.

projects.name: METRONET Perth (ongoing expansion)
projects.impact: Midland station opened Feb 2026 (suburb +22% growth). Yanchep extension, Thornlie-Cockburn link.

projects.name: Middle Arm Sustainable Development Precinct
projects.impact: Darwin LNG + hydrogen + critical minerals hub. AUKUS submarine rotation through Darwin.

projects.name: Pilbara Hydrogen Hub + Lumsden Point
projects.impact: Port Hedland export channel for battery metals. 2,000+ new mining jobs.
projects.warning: Remote regional — thin property market, high boom/bust risk

projects.name: Suburban Rail Loop
projects.impact: Reshapes Melbourne SE corridor over decades. Too distant for $800k strategy.

projects.name: Inland Rail
projects.impact: Melbourne-Brisbane freight. Boost for Toowoomba, Narromine, Moree.

projects.name: North-South Corridor (Torrens-Darlington)
projects.impact: Completes Adelaide motorway. Boost for northern suburbs commuter access.

risks.risk: Negative gearing REMOVED for established homes after 12/05/2026
risks.impact: Established demand drops 30-40% from investors. New builds + cash-flow-positive established still viable.
Pre-2027 gains protected. New purchases face min 30% tax on indexed gains.
Each 25bp cuts borrowing capacity ~3%. Investor rates pushing 7%.
More hikes likely. No pivot until back to target (mid-2028 RBA forecast).
938k forecast vs 1.2M target = 22% shortfall. Supports prices.
$368B, 20k+ jobs anchors Adelaide north + Perth south + Henderson WA + Darwin. Owner-occupier demand floor.
No income cap, no place limit. Massive owner-occupier demand absorbing investor slack.
Cyclone/flood premiums squeeze cash flow in Townsville/Cairns.
Greenfield oversupply dilutes growth in outer ring. Established Adelaide north safer.

risks.risk: VIC tax regime (1.5% surcharge + lowest growth)
risks.impact: VIC structurally disadvantaged for investors. Skip.

risks.risk: Investor flight to new builds drives those prices up
risks.impact: New build prices may rise 10-15% on flight demand.

summary: MAJOR REGIME CHANGE 12/05/2026: Federal Budget killed negative gearing on new established-property purchases + removed CGT 50% discount from July 2027. BUT — defence catalysts (AUKUS $368B / 20k jobs) + First Home Guarantee (unlimited places, no income cap) + Olympics + Western Sydney Airport + CopperString + Hunter REZ create a richer picture. The best plays under new rules are DEFENCE-ANCHORED suburbs (Adelaide north AUKUS, Perth south HMAS Stirling, Newcastle F-35, Townsville Lavarack) where owner-occupier demand from defence workers + first-home buyers absorbs any investor slack. Pure speculative growth plays (outer Sydney/Melbourne) are dead. Cash-flow positive Townsville and new builds in growth corridors are the two clear paths.
warnings: 🚨 NEGATIVE GEARING removed for established homes acquired after 12 May 2026. Existing portfolio (Murrumba Downs) grandfathered for life.
🚨 CGT 50% discount removed from 1 July 2027. Pre-2027 gains protected via deemed valuation.
🚨 RBA 4.35% — Westpac forecasts 4.85% by August. Investor rates 5.84-6.85%. Confirm serviceability before offers.
✅ DEFENCE OPPORTUNITY: AUKUS $368B/20k jobs makes Adelaide north + Perth south + Newcastle + Darwin structurally strong.
✅ FIRST HOME GUARANTEE unlimited (no income cap) = massive owner-occupier demand floor.
✅ Help to Buy shared equity scheme live = 10k more buyers/yr.
⚠ Perth +26% annual = cycle peak risk. Sub-$800k window closing fast.
⚠ Western Sydney Airport: Bringelly already $2.4M. Direct-benefit suburbs mostly priced out at $800k.
💡 STRATEGY: 1) Cash-flow positive established in defence catchments (Townsville/Adelaide north) OR 2) New builds in growth corridors (Wellard WA, Ripley QLD, Munno Para SA).
